title: rinorea tessmannii
intro: Rinorea tessmannii, also known as Tessmann's violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa, particularly in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Rinorea tessmannii has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its health benefits include relieving fever, reducing pain, and promoting wound healing.
